data.title: A certain whale has deposited a total of 10,700 BTC into Binance in the past three days, with a total value of $727 million.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, two hours ago, a whale (3NVeX) deposited another 2,535 BTC, worth $168 million, into Binance. In the past three days, this whale has deposited a total of 10,735 BTC into Binance, with a total value of $727 million.

data.title: France to Discuss Electrification Support in Next Year's Budget
data.description: France's Finance Minister, Bruno Le Maire, announced plans to meet with industry representatives to discuss support for electrification in the upcoming budget. According to Jin10, the government aims to continue backing corporate electric vehicle fleets as part of its commitment to sustainable transportation. The discussions are expected to focus on strategies to enhance electrification efforts and provide necessary financial support to facilitate the transition to electric vehicles.

data.title: Swiss Inflation Remains Stable in January Amid Mixed Price Trends
data.description: Switzerland's Federal Statistical Office reported on Friday that the country's Consumer Price Index (CPI) for January showed a year-on-year increase of 0.1% and a month-on-month decrease of 0.1%. According to Jin10, the report highlighted that declines in electricity, supplementary accommodation, air transport, and seasonal clothing prices contributed to the subdued inflation for the month. Meanwhile, prices for hotels, international travel packages, and motor vehicle insurance saw an uptick. Excluding fresh and seasonal products, energy, and fuel, the core inflation rate rose by 0.1% year-on-year and fell by 0.1% month-on-month. Additionally, the Harmonized Consumer Price Index (HCPI) decreased by 0.1% month-on-month and increased by 0.2% year-on-year.

data.title: World Liberty Financial to Enter Forex Market with New Platform
data.description: World Liberty Financial, backed by the Trump family, is set to launch its World Swap platform targeting the foreign exchange and remittance market. According to NS3.AI, the company aims to provide lower fees and more efficient services. However, it faces significant competition from Ripple, which is already well-established with its XRP Ledger known for its fast transaction speeds and reliability. Despite the promise of reduced costs, World Liberty Financial must overcome challenges posed by Ripple's mature technology and strong market presence, especially amid recent controversy over UAE investment.

data.title: NatWest Reports 30% Increase in Fourth Quarter Pretax Income
data.description: NatWest has announced a significant 30% rise in pretax income for the fourth quarter, surpassing market expectations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the bank's strong performance amid challenging economic conditions. The financial institution attributed its success to strategic initiatives and effective cost management, which have bolstered its profitability. Analysts had anticipated a more modest increase, making this result noteworthy in the banking sector. NatWest's robust earnings underscore its resilience and adaptability in a fluctuating market environment. The bank continues to focus on enhancing its operational efficiency and customer service to maintain its competitive edge.

data.title: Switzerland's Inflation Rate Turns Negative, Pressuring Central Bank
data.description: Switzerland's inflation rate has turned negative for the second time since 2021, increasing pressure on the country's central bank to address the economic implications. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced by the Swiss National Bank as it navigates this economic shift. The negative inflation rate suggests a potential deflationary trend, which could impact consumer spending and economic growth. The central bank may need to consider policy adjustments to stabilize the economy and prevent further deflation. This development comes amid broader economic uncertainties, prompting analysts to closely monitor the central bank's response.

data.title: Trader PuzzleTricker won the Copa del Rey with a single bet on Barcelona, ​​netting a profit of $2.12 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader PuzzleTricker (0x003...6beb) spent 3.23 million USDC on February 12th to bet on FC Barcelona winning the Copa del Rey. The trader profited a whopping $2.12 million after the win.

data.title: ECB Awaits Impact of Euro's Rise on Economy
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is closely monitoring the potential economic impact of the euro's appreciation, which began in 2025. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting comments from Martins Kazaks, a member of the ECB's Governing Council, who emphasized the need for patience in assessing the currency's influence on the economy. Kazaks noted that the ECB is taking a cautious approach, waiting to see how the stronger euro will affect economic conditions before making any policy adjustments. The euro's rise has been a significant factor in recent economic discussions, with analysts and policymakers alike considering its implications for growth and inflation. Kazaks' remarks underscore the ECB's commitment to carefully evaluating the situation as it unfolds.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Expiry Amid Market Downturn
data.description:
On February 13, a significant number of Bitcoin and Ethereum options are set to expire, according to PANews. Analysis from Greeks.live indicates that 38,000 BTC options and 215,000 ETH options will reach maturity. The BTC options have a Put Call Ratio of 0.71, with a maximum pain point at $74,000 and a nominal value of $2.5 billion. Meanwhile, ETH options show a Put Call Ratio of 0.82, with a maximum pain point at $2,100 and a nominal value of $410 million.

The cryptocurrency market continues to experience a downturn, with the maximum pain point decreasing rapidly. Today, options accounting for 9% of total open interest, amounting to nearly $2.9 billion, are expiring. This week, the implied volatility for Bitcoin and Ethereum has decreased, with BTC's main term IV at 50% and ETH's at 70%. Although the downward price trend has slowed, market confidence remains low. In terms of trading, put options dominate, although some buying interest has emerged following yesterday's further decline. Key options data show a rebound in Skew, and there is an increase in bullish options.

Despite the ongoing bear market, the most intense phase of the recent decline appears to be over. The crypto market currently lacks new capital inflows, making discussions of a bull market or significant rebound premature.

data.title: Binance Launches Valentine Campaign with $20,000 Reward Pool
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a special Valentine campaign is set to offer participants the chance to earn a share of a $20,000 reward pool. The campaign, which features pink-themed crypto rewards, encourages users to complete simple tasks and unlock challenges. Participants can engage in activities such as inviting friends, topping up their wallets, or trading on Spot and Futures to get closer to the Valentine rewards. The promotion period is scheduled from 2026-02-13 00:00:00 to 2026-03-13 23:59:59 (UTC), or until the rewards are fully distributed.

Participants can join the campaign through various activities. The 'Bring a Plus One' initiative allows users to invite friends to Binance, while 'Love at First Top-Up' involves depositing via Binance P2P, Fiat, Card, or Buy Crypto. 'Spot the Love' and 'Love Story' encourage trading on Binance Spot and Futures, respectively. The campaign offers rewards worth up to $1,000 in tokens with a pink icon, including AMP, UNI, and DOT.

For deposits, users in the CIS region can use USD via credit/debit card, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Uzbekistan users can deposit UZS via Humo card, while Kazakhstan users have the option of KZT deposits through local banks and Mastercard. Additionally, users can buy crypto using local currencies, including UZS and KZT, via credit/debit card, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. The P2P platform offers competitive prices and a simplified experience through P2P Express.

Terms and conditions apply to this activity, and participants must adhere to Binance's terms for prize promotions, terms of use, and privacy notice. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants acting fraudulently or not in accordance with the terms.

data.title: InsuranceDekho's Parent Company Considers $250 Million IPO in Mumbai
data.description: The parent company of InsuranceDekho is contemplating an initial public offering (IPO) in Mumbai, aiming to raise up to $250 million. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategic move to tap into the financial markets. This potential IPO reflects the company's ambition to expand its financial capabilities and strengthen its market position. The decision comes amid a growing interest in the insurance sector, which has seen significant developments in recent years. The company is evaluating the timing and structure of the IPO to maximize its benefits. Further details about the offering are expected to be disclosed as the company finalizes its plans.

data.title: Binance Research: The current 50% pullback is a mild adjustment compared to previous cycles.
data.description: Binance Research published an article on the X platform stating that the 50% drop since the all-time high in October 2025 represents a mild correction compared to previous cycles, reflecting reduced volatility as the market matures.

data.title: Shiba Inu At Risk of 70% Decline? Price Breaks Below Parallel Channel
data.description:
An analyst has pointed out how Shiba Inu’s break below the support line of a Parallel Channel could open the door to a target of $0. 00000138. Shiba Inu Has Fallen Under Parallel Channel Support In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has shared a technical analysis (TA) pattern that Shiba Inu has seemingly broken out of recently. The pattern in question is a “Parallel Channel,” which is a type of consolidation channel that forms whenever an asset’s price trades between two parallel trendlines
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/shiba-inu-coin/shiba-inu-70-decline-price-breaks-parallel-channel/
